name: TestWaitForADASSpeed
title: TestWaitForADASSpeed
syntax: long TestWaitForADASSpeed (long overUnder, float threshold, long aTimeout)
description: Waits for the occurrence of the first Detected Object matching the speed conditions passed as arguments. Should the Detected Object not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

parameters.name: overUnder
parameters.description: Specifies if the relative speed should be over or under the specified value.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Specified value that determines the maximum or minimum relative speed. An object moving towards the sensor has a negative relative speed. An object moving away from the sensor has a positive relative speed. The unit is specified in m/s.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms]. Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
